summary: Set 023 Session 4 (final): Extension reader fix. Modified isMidSetComplete in tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/utils/fileSystem.ts to consult completedSessions[] as an alternative authoritative whether-closed signal before falling through to the events-ledger check. When the array satisfies the guard but the ledger lacks the corresponding closeout, a one-line console.warn surfaces the drift shape (audit-driven from Session 2 — GPT 5.4 caveat on Q(c)). Closes Sharp Edge 1 from the Set 023 spec: a migrated pre-Set-022 set whose operator hand-adds completedSessions: [1..N] now displays as N/N Done in the Session Set Explorer without needing close_session --repair --apply to synthesize a final-session ledger event. Tests: new fileSystem.test.ts suite with fixtures F1-F7 plus a migration-shape bonus (warn assertion) and three round-1 verifier-driven coverage additions (early-return path, warn-not-fired on non-override paths, ambiguous array-misses-currentSession + no-ledger shape). Docs: docs/session-state-schema.md Parser cheat-sheet now documents the array-before-ledger ordering and the sharpened invariant phrasing (whether-closed vs when-closed); ai_router/docs/close-out.md § 5 drift case 1 gains an attestation note (operator-attested for migrated sets, tool-maintained for sets that ran the close-out gate, audit-driven from Session 2 — GPT on Q(a)). Version bumped to extension v0.13.13 (package.json, package-lock.json, CHANGELOG.md, CLAUDE.md). Smoke-test against Set 006 confirms: completedSessions: [1, 2, 3] satisfies the guard at currentSession=3, so removing the synthetic ledger event would still leave the set bucketed as Done. Cross-provider verification (gpt-5-4, session-verification) round 1 ISSUES_FOUND: 0 Critical, 0 Major; 3 Minor coverage gaps in the test suite (early-return path fixture, console.warn spy assertion, ambiguous array-misses + no-ledger shape) — all three fixed in-session. No round-2 reroute: all fixes are pure test additions; the reader behavior is unchanged. Three deferred items documented in session-004-review.md for re-evaluation post-Set-023: tri-state helper for hasCloseoutEventForSession (Q1/Q6 #1), warn dedupe/rate-limiting (Q2), upstream range validation of currentSession/totalSessions (Q6 #4). Session 4 routed spend: $0.235.
